subject: Appointment of the Chief Justice of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Alan Diner, a Judge of the Federal Court, to be Chief Justice of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal.
